_comment: Local CRM overlay — contacts added by Prem outside the team All-e sheet. Merged into CRM view at load time. All-e sheet is NOT modified.

contacts.agents: All-e — 4 workstreams (Search, Catalog Taxonomy, Knowledge Graph API, eCom pipelines + MCP)
contacts.conv_details: F2F at Havells HQ (QRG Towers, NOIDA) on 15 Apr 2026. Discussed 4 workstreams: (1) Search on website — Magento/Adobe integration, (2) Catalog taxonomy & enrichment, (3) Knowledge Graph as API — pilot proposed with real historic data (consumer or distributor/retailer), (4) eCom data pipelines + MCP with pre-built connectors (Magento, Flipkart, Amazon, Meta, Google, Zepto, Instamart). Agreed to split into 2 workstreams (1/2/3 clubbed) and set up subsequent meeting. Amruta leading from Graas side. Pilot discussed.
contacts.comments: Pilot discussed. Follow-up: send video on catalog taxonomy process by tomorrow. Avdhesh Babu mobile: +91-8171432432.
